meaning: n.圣地,圣所,密室,私室,书房
examples: She once allowed me into her inner sanctum.
Only the sliver of the land that is almost impossible to see from the road will remain the sanctum of his high-value crop.
EMU, but made the Italians pray still harder to be let into the inner sanctum.
Beyond these houses is a lower wall and then an entrance into the compound's "inner sanctum".
